response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development, including C and C++ (LabWindows/CVI at National Instruments), but his recent roles have focused heavily on web/mobile technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Dlang) and lacks recent, deep C++ experience or cloud/Azure exposure. While he demonstrates strong architectural and problem-solving skills, his alignment with the role's specific requirements (C++ STL, industrial cybersecurity, IEC 62443) is limited. The career gap (Oct 2025–present) also raises concerns about current engagement in relevant technologies.
strengths: Strong foundation in C/C++ (LabWindows/CVI at National Instruments)
Proven ability to design and deliver scalable, high-performance systems (e.g., micro-services infrastructure at Dunnhumby)
Experience with secure coding practices and TDD (e.g., Altom Consulting, RIDE Capital)
concerns: Limited recent C++ STL or industrial automation experience; primarily worked in web/mobile technologies since 2020
No explicit mention of IEC 62443, SDL, or cloud platform solutions (Azure)
Career gap (Oct 2025–present) without clear relevance to the role
